## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Testing

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] relevant `swift test`
- [ ] UI automation if the change affects terminal interaction or app workflows

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Added or updated tests where practical
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Updated localizations (`en` / `zh-Hans`) for user-facing strings if needed
- [ ] Added screenshots or GIFs for visible UI changes when useful

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
